case_title: BO NICOLE CAPENER VS. MAKING TECHNOLOGIES MATTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAPENER, BO NICOLE (FORMERLY BO NICOLE HEARST) AS TO DEFENDANT MAKING TECHNOLOGIES MATTER (MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.
